ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients.text: CONTAINS LESS THAN TWO PERCENT OF LEAVENING

ingredients_text: SWEET POTATOES 90%, VEGETABLE OIL 6% (SOYBEAN), BATTER 4% (MODIFIED FOOD STARCH, RICE FLOUR, CORN STARCH, SALT, DEXTRIN, CONTAINS LESS THAN TWO PERCENT OF LEAVENING (SODIUM ACID PYROPHOSPHATE, SODIUM BICARBONATE), XANTHAN GUM, EXTRACTIVE OF PAPRIKA (COLOR)).
